title: webKinPred: Open Kinetics Predictor
description: Open Kinetics Predictor is a web interface and API for predicting enzyme kinetic parameters (kcat and KM) from protein sequences and substrate SMILES. It integrates multiple published machine learning and deep learning prediction engines behind a unified asynchronous job API.
